title: Senior Plant Manager at LG Electronics India

jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at LG Electronics India
jsonLd.description:
LG Electronics India has an exciting opening for a Plant Manager at our Coimbatore office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About LG Electronics India:
LG Electronics India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LG Electronics India!
